name: nasibashop-monorepo
description: Скрипты уровня монорепозитория (сервисы и фронты — в своих package.json).

scripts.dev:frontends: concurrently -k -n storefront,admin -c auto "npm run dev --prefix frontends/storefront" "npm run dev --prefix frontends/admin-panel -- --port 3001"
scripts.start:frontends: concurrently -k -n storefront,admin -c auto "npm run start --prefix frontends/storefront -- -p 3000" "npm run start --prefix frontends/admin-panel -- -p 3001"
scripts.build:frontends: npm run build --prefix frontends/storefront && npm run build --prefix frontends/admin-panel
